series_metadata.series_title: Appointment and Application Materials for Advisory Council, Grant Advisors, and Scorers
series_metadata.series_description: Documents submitted by the members of the advisory council, grant advisors, and scorers: including but not limited to applications, resumes, and conflict of interest forms. Training materials distributed to advisory council, grant advisors, and scorers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
